reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion de los empleados. Agradecer la paciencia con todas las personas cuando.llego un contingente bastante nimeroso. Venimos de buenos aires de la zona norte a explotar nuevos caminos. Gracias otra vez por la buena predisposicion.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. We appreciate their patience with everyone when a fairly large group arrived. We came from the northern part of Buenos Aires to explore new roads. Thanks again for your helpfulness.
